name: autoreview
description: Deterministic pre-commit review gate for AI coding agents — intercepts git commit and triggers a multi-perspective review of risky staged changes before the commit proceeds. Requires python3.

interface.shortDescription: Pre-commit review gate for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: A PreToolUse hook intercepts git commit and runs a deterministic, zero-LLM gate over the staged change. Trivial changes pass silently; non-trivial, sensitive, or hand-resolved-merge changes are blocked with a directive to run the autoreview skill, which spawns parallel reviewers (correctness, security, conventions), aggregates a verdict, and lets the agent address findings before re-committing. The gate runs on python3 (ships with macOS/Linux) and fails open if absent.
